name: brandwala-wholesale-quasar-root
description: Root scripts for web app and Supabase backend

scripts.deploy:frontend: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f web/.env ] && . web/.env; set +a; : "${CF_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME:?Set CF_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME in web/.env}" && rm -rf web/node_modules web/.quasar web/dist && npm --prefix web ci --include=optional && npm --prefix web exec wrangler login && npm --prefix web run build && npm --prefix web exec wrangler pages deploy web/dist/spa --project-name "$CF_PAGES_PROJECT_NAME" --commit-dirty=true'
scripts.backend:link:push:types: sh -c 'npm run backend:link && npx supabase db push --linked --include-all && mkdir -p web/src/types && npx supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > web/src/types/supabase.ts'
scripts.backend:types: sh -c 'mkdir -p web/src/types && npx supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > web/src/types/supabase.ts'
scripts.deploy:backend: npm run backend:push && npm run backend:types
scripts.backend:all: npm run backend:push:all && npm run backend:types
